login.detail: You need to log in to Game Park to build and save your decks.
login.title: You're not logged in!
alt.subscribers.only: You must subscribe to play with alternative versions of cards.
card.name.1110: Hero of the Battle of Nerz
deck.delete.confirm: Do you confirm the deletion of the deck "{name}"?
deck.name: Name your deck
deck.rules.copies:
It cannot contain more than six copies of a card with the same name that is of a value of
6 or more.
deck.rules.initiative: It cannot contain more than five cards with the Initiative attribute.
deck.rules.legendary: It cannot contain more than one copy of a Legendary card with the same name.
deck.rules.limit: Some cards have an individual limit; this limit is displayed in roman numerals on the top left corner of these cards.
deck.rules.size: It must be composed of precisely twenty three cards of the same faction.
deck.rules.stealth: It cannot contain more than six cards with the Stealth attribute.
deck.rules.value: The sum of the deck building values of the twenty three cards must be 125 points or less.
max.deck.delete: You can delete one before saving it.
max.deck.info: You cannot save more than {max} decks.
max.deck.subscribe: Subscribe to Game Park to register up to {max} decks.
ability.attack.condition.even-value: can only attack enemy cards with an even value.
ability.attack.limit.bottom-right:
cannot attack cards adjacent to its right and bottom borders.
<0>Please note: when you control this card, it will be displayed upside down, in accordance with the table rules.</0>
ability.attack.limit.during-initiative: cannot attack during the Initiative sequence.
ability.attack.limit.in-group: cannot take part in group attack.
ability.attack.limit.in-group-not-family: can only participate in group attacks with other allied <1>{family}</1> creatures.
ability.attack.per: gains <0>{modifier} Attack</0> for each of the {multipliers}.
ability.attack.per.token: gains <0>{modifier} Attack</0> for each extra Faction token on this card.
ability.attacked.condition.creatures-if-: <1>{card}</1> can only be attacked by adjacent creatures or spells
ability.attacked.condition.creatures-in-: Enemy creatures can only attack <1>{card}</1> with a group attack.
ability.attacked.limit.creatures: {targets} cannot be attacked by enemy creatures.
ability.attacked.limit.group-creatures: Enemy creatures cannot attack <1>{card}</1> in a group attack. (one creature can group with spells).
ability.cannot-place.last-turn: you cannot place this card during the last turn.
ability.deactivate: {targets} are deactivated. They are reactivated when they are no longer affected.
ability.defense.targets.per: {targets} gain <0>{modifier} Defense</0> for each of the {multipliers} (to them).
ability.end-of-turn-move:
at the end of your turn, you can move the <1>{card}</1>.
She can't attack afterwards.
ability.hit-allies: when <1>{card}</1> attacks, adjacent ally creatures are considered enemy creatures.
ability.ignore-fellow-weakness: despite their weaknesses, {targets} can perform group attacks with the <1>{card}</1>.
ability.ignore-modifiers: no other card can modify the <1>{card}’s</1> Attack & Defense values.
ability.inverts-attack-defense: inverts the Attack & Defense values of {targets} once all other modifiers have been applied.
ability.modify.movement.if: <0>+{modifier} Movement</0> if the <1>{card}</1> doesn't attack this round and ends its movement adjacent to an enemy card.
ability.range.add.targets: {targets} with Ranged Attack add +{modifier} to their attribute.
ability.score.cards-under: at the end of the game, add the points of the cards underneath the <1>{card}</1> to your total points.
ability.score.masters:
at the end of the game, add to your total points the value of every enemy creature that is adjacent:
• to <1>Masters of AracKhan</1>
• to any allied creature adjacent to <1>Masters of AracKhan</1>.
ability.swarm-same: the Swarm attribute only applies to creatures named <1>{card}</1>.
ability.targets.attack.condition.creatur: {targets} can only attack in group attacks.
ability.targets.attacked.condition.creat: {targets} can only be attacked either by enemy creatures in group attacks, or with spells.
ability.trigger.dragon-trophy: every creature with Flight or Movement destroyed by the <1>{card}</1> is placed underneath this card.
ability.trigger.end-round.destroy: at the end of the round, {targets} are destroyed.
ability.trigger.fail-attack.destroy: if any of the <1>{card}</1>'s attacks fails, it is destroyed.
targets.adjacent.ally.creature.max-value: adjacent allied creature of a value of {maxValue} or less
targets.adjacent.creature.max-value.attr: adjacent creatures of a value of {maxValue} or less with {attribute}
targets.ally.creature.max-value: allied creatures of a value of {maxValue} or less
if.attack.fly: when attacking a creature with Flight
if.attack.fly-move: when attacking a creature with Flight or Movement
if.attack.initiative: when attacking a creature with Initiative
if.defense.fly-move: when attacked by creatures with Flight or Movement
if.no-start-round: if you don't start the round
if.there-is: if there is a {target} on the battlefield
if.there-is-not: if there is no {target} on the battlefield
action.101:
Discard <1>Horse of Avalon</1> and replace it with a creature from your hand.
This creature can be activated.
action.103:
During your turn, replace the characteristics of a target allied creature with the ones of another creature on the battlefield.
If the target creature is deactivated, reactivate it.
action.104:
Destroy <1>Adrielle</1> and replace her with a creature from your hand.
This creature can be activated.
action.105: Once per round and for its duration, change the Attack/Defense values of the <1>Ice Elemental</1> to either <0>0/3</0>, <0>2/1</0> or <0>3/0</0>. Then, reactivate this card.
action.106:
Destroy the <1>Novice Fairy</1> and replace it with a creature of a value of 5 or less from your hand.
This creature can be activated.
action.107: <1>Nemesio</1> and another creature on the battlefield swap their skills for the duration of the round.
action.108: Draw up to 4 cards, then return the same amount to the draw pile and shuffle it.
action.109: Move any number of adjacent allied creatures up to a distance of 2.
action.110: Move an adjacent enemy creature to a distance of up to 3.
action.112: Move up to two allied creatures of a value of 5 or less each.
action.113: Swap an adjacent allied creature with an allied creature anywhere on the battlefield. The value of each creature must be 8 or less.
action.114: Add 1 Faction token to this card.The added tokens cannot be used to reactivate the <1>Protector</1>.
action.115: Move any number of allied <1>Musician</1> and <1>Dancer</1> creatures up to a distance of 2.
action.116:
Swap the position of two allied creatures.
Then, you can once again swap the position of two allied creatures.
action.117: Once per round, swap the <1>Assassin</1> with another allied creature of a value of 4 or less. Then, reactivate the <1>Assassin</1>.
action.118: Once per round, destroy an allied creature of a value of 3 or more. <1>Nemesio</1> replaces his characteristics with the ones of any targeted creature on the battlefield for the duration of the round. Then reactivate <1>Nemesio</1>.
action.119: Move the <1>Standard-Bearer</1> to a distance of 1. Then, you can move any number of allied <1>6ᵀᴴ Legion</1> creatures to a distance of 1 in the same direction as the <1>Standard Bearer</1>. Do so one creature at a time.
action.121:
Move an allied creature up to a distance of 3.
This creature gets <0>+1 Attack</0> until the end of the round.
action.122:
Place up to two <1>6ᵀᴴ Legion</1> creatures from your hand of a value of 8 or less each.
These creatures must be adjacent to another <1>6ᵀᴴ Legion</1> creature and cannot be adjacent to an enemy card.
These creatures can be activated.
action.123:
Move any number of allied <1>6ᵀᴴ Legion</1> creatures up to a distance of 2.
Move them one by one.
action.124: Move an allied creature. Once moved, it must be adjacent to an allied card and cannot be adjacent to an enemy card. Then deactivate that creature.
action.126: Swap the Faction token of an enemy creature with the one of an allied creature, both being adjacent to <1>Nemesio</1>. At the end of the round, swap the Faction tokens back.
action.127: Destroy an allied creature to add its characteristics to another allied creature for the duration of the round.
action.128:
Target an enemy creature. Replace its Faction token with one of yours on the active side for the duration of the round.
When <1>Possession</1> is discarded, place the enemy creature's original Faction token on the active side.
action.move.creature: {card}: move {count, plural, one{a creature} other{up to # creatures}} or <0>pass</0>
action.move.creature.player: {card}: {player} can move {count, plural, one{a creature} other{up to # creatures}}
ancestral-library.player: Ancestral Library: {player} must return {count, plural, one{# card} other{# cards}} to the draw pile
ancestral-library.you: Ancestral Library: you must return {count, plural, one{# card} other{# cards}} to the draw pile
backup.choose: Backup: place a 6ᵀᴴ Legion creature worth 6 or less from you hand
backup.pass: Backup: place another 6ᵀᴴ Legion creature or <0>pass</0>
backup.player: Backup: {player} can place up to two 6ᵀᴴ Legion creatures
essence-absorption.player: Essence Absorption: {player} selects another allied creature
essence-absorption.you: Essence Absorption: select another allied creature
marching-order.move: Marching Order: move your 6ᵀᴴ Legion creatures or <0>pass</0>
marching-order.player: Marching Order: {player} can move their 6ᵀᴴ Legion creatures
mimicry.target.choice: Mimicry: {player} chooses the target allied creature
mimicry.target.choose: Mimicry: choose the target allied creature
nemesio.blight.player: Nemesio: {player} selects the creatures that swap their Faction token
nemesio.blight.you: Nemesio: select the creatures that swap their Faction token
standard-bearer.move: You can move you Standard Bearer
standard-bearer.move.legion: Standard Bearer: move your 6ᵀᴴ Legion creatures or <0>pass</0>
standard-bearer.player: Standard Bearer: {player} can move 6ᵀᴴ Legion creatures
white-gates.player: The White Gates: {player} can move adjacent creatures
white-gates.you: The White Gates: move your adjacent creatures or <0>pass</0>
rules.card.astral-plane: This card is in {player}'s Astral Plane.
rules.card.astral-plane.mine: This card is in your Astral Plane.
rules.card.battlefield: This card is on the battlefield under {player}'s control.
rules.card.battlefield.mine: This card is on the battlefield under your control.
rules.card.creature: It is a <0>Creature</0> with an Attack value of <0>{attack}</0> and a Defense value of <0>{defense}</0>.
rules.card.deck-value: Secondary value: <0>{value}</0> (top right corner). Replaces card value when building a deck.
rules.card.effects: This card is impacted by some effects:
rules.card.family: Family: <0>{family}</0>. Some game mechanics only affect cards of the same family.
rules.card.hand.mine: This card is in your hand.
rules.card.land: It's a <0>Land</0> with a defense value of <0>{defense}</0>. In case of a successful attack, a Land is not destroyed, it is captured.
rules.card.legendary: <0>Legendary</0> (top left corner). This card is limited to 1 copy when building a deck.
rules.card.limit: Limit: <0>{limit}</0> (top left corner). This card is limited to {limit} copies when building a deck.
rules.card.spell.active: This is a <0>Spell</0>. Once played, it is discarded after activation or at the end of the owner's turn.
rules.card.spell.astral: <0>Astral</0>: this spell is played in the player's Astral Plane.
rules.card.spell.passive: This is a <0>Spell</0>. Once played, it is discarded at the end of the round.
rules.card.value: Value: <0>{value}</0> (top right corner). After the End phase of round 9, each player adds up the values of their cards still present on the battlefield that have their faction tokens on them. The player with the highest score wins the game.
rules.deck.list: Here's the deck composition <0>(click on the deck during the game to review this list)</0>:
rules.faction-token.flipped: <0>This token is turned over</0>: the card on which it is placed is deactivated.
rules.faction-token.neutral.purpose: When two players play the same faction, one of them uses the neutral faction tokens.
rules.faction-token.neutral.title: Neutral faction token
rules.faction-token.purpose:
Faction tokens are placed on battlefield cards.
They are used to indicate who owns the card, and whether it is active or deactivated.
rules.faction-token.title: {faction} faction token
rules.battle-mat.battlefield: In the center of the battlefield, the 4 green squares represent the starting zone, where the first player deploys his cards in the first round.
rules.battle-mat.players: Each player has a slot for his deck, for his discard pile and an <0>Astrale Plane</0>.
rules.battle-mat.purpose: The battle mat represents the playing zone on which the players will compete.
rules.battle-mat.title: The battle mat
rules.round-track.purpose: A game of AracKhan Wars consists of 9 rounds. This track shows the current round, and who is playing first in that round.
rules.round-track.title: Round track
rules.attribute.1: This card can be activated during the Initiative sequence.
rules.attribute.2: This card can move {distance, plural, one{# space} other{# spaces}} before attacking.
rules.attribute.3: This card can move anywhere before attacking.
rules.attribute.4: When this card attacks, it performs a simultaneous attack on each adjacent enemy.
rules.attribute.5: This card can attack enemies up to {distance} spaces away.
rules.attribute.6: This card gains +1 attack for every other card sharing the same family on the battlefield (allied or not).
rules.attribute.7: When this card is active and should be destroyed by an enemy attack, it is deactivated instead. Does not work if the card is attacked by a spell.
rules.attribute.8: Increases by 1 the distance separating them from adjacent enemy creatures attacking them.
rules.attribute.9: If this card makes a successful attack, it attacks the enemy on the next space in the same direction (if any), with an attack strength reduced by 1, and so on as long as the attack succeeds.
rules.astral-plane.purpose:
Cards with the <0/> symbol must be placed on the astral
plane. Please note: the astral plane is not part of the
battlefield.
rules.astral-plane.title: Astral plane
rules.discard.content: There {number, plural, one{is # card} other{are # cards}} in {player}’s discard.
rules.discard.content.mine: There {number, plural, one{is # card} other{are # cards}} in your discard.
rules.discard.title: {player}’s discard
rules.cards-under: The following cards can be found under this card:
rules.score: At the end of Round 9, each player adds up the values of the cards under his control on the battlefield (Creatures and Places). The player with the most points wins.
rules.score.mine: You have <0>{score} points</0>, <0>{cards, plural, one{# card} other{# cards}} on the battlefield</0> and <1>{discard, plural, one{# creature} other{# creatures}} in your discard pile</1>.
rules.score.player: {player} has <0>{score} points</0>, <0>{cards, plural, one{# card} other{# cards}} on the battlefield</0> and <1>{discard, plural, one{# creature} other{# creatures}} in the discard pile</1>.
rules.tie.1: The player with the most allied cards placed on the battlefield wins.
rules.tie.2: If there is still a tie, the player with the fewest allied creatures in their discard pile wins.
rules.tie.3: If the tie still persists, the game is finally declared a draw.
header.start: {player} must choose who goes first in round 1
header.start.choice: You must <0>choose who goes first in round 1</0>
header.reveal: Reveal phase: players reveal the cards placed
header.mulligan: Players can exchange cards from their hand
header.mulligan.done: Mulligan: <0>shuffle and draw {cards, plural, one{# card} other{# cards}}</0>
header.mulligan.pass: Mulligan: you can exchange cards, or <0>pass</0>
header.draw: Draw phase: each player draws 2 cards
header.placement: {player} must place 2 cards on the battlefield
header.placement.me: You must place 2 cards on the battlefield
header.initiative.me: You can activate cards with Initiative, or <0>pass</0>
header.initiative.pass: You have no more cards with Initiative to activate, you must <0>pass</0>
header.activation.pass: You have no more cards to activate, you must <0>pass</0>
header.attack.solve: You can activate other cards or <0>solve the attack</0>
header.move: {player} can attack with {card} or deactivate it
header.move.you: You can attack with {card} or <0>deactivate it</0>
header.moves: {player} can attack or deactivate moved creatures
header.ice-elemental.player: Ice Elemental: {player} choose the new Attack & Defense values
header.deactivate.player: {card}: {player} must choose a creature to deactivate
header.deactivate.you: {card}: you must choose a creature to deactivate
header.destroy.player: {card}: {player} must choose a creature to destroy
header.destroy.you: {card}: you must choose a creature to destroy
header.discard.player: {card}: {player} must choose a card to discard
header.discard.you: {card}: you must choose a card to discard
header.end-of-turn.pass: You have no more end-of-turn effects, you must <0>pass</0>
tuto.activation:
It's now the <0>activation phase</0>!
Starting with the first player, each player can activate each of their cards once, usually to attack the opponent's cards.
tuto.activation.2:
Your <0>{card1}</0> has been destroyed, but your <0>{card2}</0> has survived thanks to the support of your <0>{card3}</0>.
It's time to strike back!
tuto.advice: So making your cards survive is just as important as destroying your opponents' cards.
tuto.astral: Some spells with the <0/> symbol are not played on the battlefield but in the player's Astral Plane.
tuto.attack: Move your <0>{card1}</0> onto the opponent's <0>{card2}</0> to attack!
tuto.attack.meteor:
It's not enough to kill the <1>{card1}</1>, but your <1>{card2}</1> has the attribute <0>Ranged Attack 3</0>.
This is enough to attack the <1>{card1}</1>. Its ability doesn't protect it from group attacks with a spell!
tuto.attack.rule: For an attack to succeed, the attack value must be strictly greater than the defense value of the card being attacked.
tuto.attack.solve:
The attack is planned. The skull indicates that the enemy creature will be destroyed and go into the opponent's discard pile.
Click "<0>solve the attack</0>" at the top.
tuto.attack.value: Each creature has a <0>attack value</0>, displayed here.
tuto.creatures: The 4 cards placed on the battlefield are <0>creatures</0>.
tuto.deactivate: The token on your <0>{card}</0> is flipped to indicate that the card is deactivated: it can no longer act in this round.
tuto.defense.value: Each creature also has a <0>defense value</0>, displayed here.
tuto.end: Now it's your turn to play. Have fun and good luck!
tuto.end-round-1: Your opponent has passed. After the activation phase, the cards are reactivated, <0>each player draws 2 cards</0> and a new round begins. This time, your opponent places and activates his cards first!
tuto.group-attack:
In <0>AracKhan Wars</0>, cards can group their attacks.
Start by attacking the <1>{card1}</1> with your <1>{card2}</1>
tuto.hand: This is your hand of cards with which you can compete against your opponent.
tuto.help: The cards have many different attributes, skills or effects: click on the cards to find out what they do!
tuto.land:
In addition to <0>Creatures</0> and <0>Spells</0>, there's a 3rd type of card in AracKhan Wars: <0>Lands</0>.
They can't attack, but offer powerful benefits. Be careful, though: if a Land is defeated, it passes under the control of the opposing player!
tuto.move.penguin: Move your <0>{card1}</0> above your <0>{card2}</0> to keep it safe from the hostile <0>{card3}</0>!
tuto.movement:
Your <0>{card}</0> has an attribute <1>Move 2</1>.
It can move 2 spaces (without crossing enemy cards).
tuto.pass.1: Congratulations! You have no more cards to activate. Click on <0>Pass</0> at the top to give the hand to your opponent.
tuto.pass.2: Bravo! Your <0>{card1}</0> won't be able to kill the <0>{card2}</0> opponent, you can <1>Pass</1>
tuto.place-card: Take the card <0>{card}</0> in your hand and place it here.
tuto.placement.1:
Each round begins with the placement phase. The first player places 2 cards face down on the battlefield, then the other player does the same.
<0>The first player changes each round.</0>
tuto.placement.2: The second player is not restricted to the starting area, but each card placed must be adjacent to another card.
tuto.placement.validation: Once you've placed your cards, click <0>Validate</0> at the top to pass the hand to the other player.
tuto.reveal:
After each player has placed 2 cards face-down, the 4 cards are revealed.
A faction token is placed on each creature. On this face, it indicates that the creature is active.
tuto.skills:
Your <0>{card1}</0> has a skill that improves the defense of adjacent creatures.
It may allow us to protect our <0>{card2}</0>!
tuto.spell: <0>{card}</0> is a spell. A spell cannot be attacked by the opponent, but is discarded after use or at the end of the round at the latest.
tuto.start-zone: In the first round, the first player places his cards in the starting area.
